race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Handicap (C1)
race.comment: GEEGEES DOWNPOUR (7) gives away starts but has impressed this track/trip at his last two. Made a stack of ground beaten a nose last time, and he can take this out with average luck in the run. VORTISTAR (6) is free running and deserved his Maiden win here over 1400m. Has been freshened after disappointing over a mile following and has been kept up to the mark with a Longford trial placing. Switches back to 1200m and can bounce back. IN YOUR DREAMS (2) wasted no time getting off the mark, winning his Maiden easily here over 1200m on debut. Has an awkward gate but keeps a highly promising apprentice and has been kept on the fresh side. Looks capable of taking the next step. HIGHLAND DUEL (1) has trialled well for his return. Has raced well fresh and won her only start here over this distance. Draws out, but the 2kg claim is handy, and she's likely to go well.
